project.name: Ad 1 — Stop Typing (BarrelBook Instagram)
project.description: Produce four MP4 deliverables for a 15s Instagram ad about BarrelBook's snap-review-save flow. Uses repo assets only. No live-action shoot required.

required: All four MP4 deliverables render without errors
Each master is between 12 and 15 seconds
Captions are readable and inside safe zones (top 22% / bottom 28% kept clear)
Brief no-go list is clean: no multi-bottle, no social, no ratings, no trading, no export, no unsupported pricing claims
ffprobe reports a valid audio track on every master except the silent variant (which may have music-only)

items.title: Environment check
items.description: Verify ffmpeg present; install edge-tts via pip; download Inter font (SF-Pro-alike); ensure output paths writable.

items.title: Captions module
items.description: Single source of truth for all 8 caption cues with text, timing, position, style.
acceptanceCriteria: captions.py exports CAPTIONS list of 8 entries
Each entry has text, t_in, t_out, shot_id, pos

items.title: Render Shot 1 (Hook)
items.description: BB-Image2 Small.png Ken Burns + caption 'Stop typing bourbon bottle details.' 2s.

items.title: Render Shot 2 (Pain)
items.description: Generate fake Notes screenshot via PIL, slight handheld shake, caption 'Notes. Spreadsheets. Manual entry.' 2s.

items.title: Render Shot 4 (Capture)
items.description: Blantons1 → Blantons2 crossfade + caption 'Snap the bottle.' 2s.

items.title: Render Shot 5 (Review/Edit)
items.description: Blantons3 → Blantons5 with punch-in + caption 'Review. Edit if needed.' 3s.

items.title: Render Shot 6 (Save)
acceptanceCriteria: Pulse glow visible on save-button region

items.title: Render Shot 7 (Result)
items.description: Catalog1 → Catalog2 parallax + caption 'Now it's in your catalog.' 3s.

items.title: Render Shot 8 (End card)
items.description: Logo Mark on #0A0A0A, copper CTA 'Download BarrelBook', BarrelBook for iPhone + 'Snap. Review. Save.' 1s.

items.title: Voiceover
items.description: edge-tts en-US-GuyNeural male VO; script v1 ('Still typing bourbon bottle details?...'). Time-align to total 15s.

items.title: Music bed
items.description: Fetch royalty-free track OR synthesize ambient pad. Normalize.

items.title: Mix audio
items.description: Duck music under VO (sidechain compressor), optional save-tap SFX at 10.5s, export main and silent mixes.

items.title: Variant alt hook
items.description: Re-render Shot 1 with caption 'Built for bottles that are annoying to type in.' → stop_typing_9x16_hook_collector.mp4.

items.title: Variant 4:5 feed
items.description: Re-render at 1080x1350 with tightened safe zones → stop_typing_4x5_main.mp4.

items.title: Verification pass
items.description: ffprobe all masters, extract middle-frame thumbs, brief no-go checklist signoff.

items.title: SUMMARY.md
items.description: Sprint summary: files delivered, decisions, recommended next steps.
